creator: rleigh@codelibre.net
text:
Created attachment 191098
Patch for 3.2.1

We made a new upstream release yesterday.  The attached patch updates the port to use 3.2.1.  I've tested the patch with poudriere.

Note: I've left the port using the old autotools build, but you might want to think about switching over to the CMake build.

Thanks,
Roger
